Dannis Faleet [ Jewelcrafting Supplies ]  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded March 6th, 2010 by __DEL__1715559376468

Category: EverQuest

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20

Goods sold (68):
Blessed Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Bracelet Mold 41pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Copper Amulet 1gp 4cp
Delicate Gem Glue Solvent 104pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Dragon Rune Sketch 4pp 6gp 8sp 5cp
Earring Mold 41pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Electrum Bar 2pp 6gp 2sp 4cp
Embossing Sketch 1pp 4sp 9cp
Emerald Ring 68pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Eminent Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Exalted Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Fine Sand 2pp 9sp 9cp
Fire Emerald 89pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Gold Bar 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Gold Embossing 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp
Gold Ring 1pp 2gp 5sp 9cp
Golden Earring 8gp 3sp 9cp
Grinding Powder 2sp
Half-Moon Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Half-Moon Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Half-Moon Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Illustrious Weapon Augmenting by Jewelcrafting 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Jade Earring 4pp 7gp 2sp 4cp
Jade Ring 13pp 1gp 2sp 4cp
Jeweler's Kit 1pp 4sp 9cp
Large Gem Glue Solvent 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Legacy of Jewel Craft 1gp 4cp
Marquise Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Marquise Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Marquise Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Numinous Weapon Augmenting 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Oval Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Oval Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Oval Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Pear Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Pear Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Pear Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Pearl Earring 1pp 4sp 9cp
Pendant Mold 41pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Platinum Bar 104pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Platinum Embossing 3pp 2gp 5sp 4cp
Revered Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Ring Mold 41pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Round Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Round Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Round Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Sacred Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Sapphire 104pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Silver Amulet 2pp 6gp 2sp 4cp
Silver Bar 5gp 2sp 4cp
Silver Earring 2gp 9cp
Silver Ring 5gp 2sp 4cp
Silver Stud 1gp 5sp 7cp
Small Gem Glue Solvent 1gp 4cp
Solo Setting Tool 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Square Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Square Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Square Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Square Cut Tool 5pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Star Ruby 68pp 2gp 4sp 9cp
Sublime Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Temporite and Compartmented Jewelry 52pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
The Basics of Jewelcrafting 1pp 4sp 9cp
Trillion Cut Earring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Trillion Cut Pendant Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Trillion Cut Ring Jewelry Mold 2pp 9sp 9cp
Veil Mold 41pp 9gp 9sp 9cp
Venerable Weapon Augmenting 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp

Known Habitats:
